We and our partners use cookies and other personal data to operate and improve the functionality of our website, manage our business, derive insights, customize our content, marketing and advertising, and otherwise optimize the experience and satisfaction of our customers. By clicking “I Agree” below, you consent to such processing of personal data. You can manage your settings to adjust your consent choices, including to withdraw consent, at any time by changing your settings elections on this site. For more information, please visit our Bombas Privacy Policy and Cookies Policy or click “Cookie Settings” below.

Cookie Settings

We and our partners use cookies and similar technologies to process personal data in order to operate and improve the functionality of our website, keep our website secure, enable us to comply with our legal obligations, derive insights, customize our content, marketing and advertising, optimize the experience and satisfaction of our customers, and otherwise manage our business.

For certain purposes, we may rely on a lawful basis other than consent to process personal data. You can read more about this and how to object if we are relying on our legitimate interests by reading our Bombas Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy

We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the data protection practices of any third-party sites or services, including, but not limited to, our third-party international e-commerce vendor(s) (currently, Global-e). To learn more about the practices of the third-party partners listed below, we strongly advise you to review their privacy policies. Without limiting the foregoing, (i) the cookies, pixels, and similar technologies placed pursuant to our use of Global-e’s services are categorized by Global-e and (ii) the “Status” of such cookies, pixels, and similar technologies is determined and effected by Global-e based on your elections below pursuant to Global-e’s data protection practices; to read Global-e’s Cookies Policy, please click HERE.

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Vendors/Cookies

Always Active

Such cookies are necessary to enable our website to function, to keep our website secure, or to enable us to comply with our contractual or other legal obligations.

  • Shopify [Necessary]
    Always Active

  • Gladly/Snowplow
    Always Active

  • CHEQ AI
    Always Active

  • Riskified
    Always Active

  • OneTrust
    Always Active

Functional/Performance (non-advertising/marketing) Vendors/Cookies

Such cookies are not strictly necessary, and include cookies that: (a) allow us to remember choices you make when you visit our website (such as your username and region) and to provide more enhanced personalized features; and (b) tell us how visitors use our website (for example, which pages of our website are the most and least popular and how visitors navigate our website), which helps us analyze and improve our website and the experience of our customers. The functionality of certain vendors does not allow such vendors’ Functional/Performance cookies to be blocked, but, if you do not provide necessary consent for such cookies (if/as required by your jurisdiction) or if you elect to “turn off” such cookies, those vendors place such cookies as “session” cookies that are automatically deleted when you close your browser.
